# QALS-07 Plan: Chapter Event Management UI

GitHub issue: #289

## Objective

Make the chapter event-management surface more usable for launch operators. Presidents, vice presidents, and chapter editors should see the next operational actions clearly on desktop and mobile without hidden horizontal scrolling.

## Scope

- Chapter events list page copy.
- Chapter events table/card action layout.
- Public/publish/check-in action clarity.

## Tasks

- [x] Inspect chapter events page, events table, and event form routing.
- [x] Keep critical row actions visible on desktop and mobile.
- [x] Add a public-view action for published events.
- [x] Improve Spanish-first copy for chapter operator labels and publish/delete dialogs.
- [x] Run type validation.
- [x] Comment validation evidence on GitHub issue #289.

## Validation

- `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`

## Notes

- Full browser screenshots are deferred to QALS-10 seeded-persona launch QA so the visual pass can cover all active roles and routes together.
